scope: tools/habitat/src/service/modules/** and tools/habitat/src/service/model/** recursive suffix shape
forbids: service module and service-model files with invalid suffixes or residual router shape drift
why: The Habitat Toolkit must be its own golden example for recursive service module file naming.
remediate: Use the accepted service file suffixes. Direct root topology is owned by validate_habitat_service_module_root_topology.
message: Habitat service module shape validation failed.
